_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant ATRX protein expression is associated with poor overall survival in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: only 7% (2/30) of plexiform neurofibromas and atypical neurofibromas show aberrant ATRX protein expression...compared to 57% (43/74) of MPNSTs showing aberrant ATRX protein (p < 0.0001)
details: Detected aberrant ATRX expression in 57% (43/74) of MPNSTs compared to only 7% (2/30) of plexiform and atypical neurofibromas (p < 0.0001)
